description: ICE 'NEWS RELEASE' graphic, square format. The background is a solid deep navy-blue field with a woodgrain texture. The centered upper area shows the gray DHS/ICE seal beside the name 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement' in gray serif type, underlined by a thin red horizontal rule. Below, the words 'NEWS RELEASE' appear in large bold white sans-serif capitals, followed by a white serif subhead reading 'Detainer placed on person of interest in connection with California fires.' There is no photograph; the graphic is text only.
notable_text: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement; NEWS RELEASE; Detainer placed on person of interest in connection with California fires
